_comment: Scenario 26: Gazebo Full VIO Pipeline — exercises feature extraction, stereo matching, and IMU pre-integration on Gazebo-rendered frames

scenario.name: gazebo_full_vio
scenario.description: Fly a short mission with the full VIO pipeline running on Gazebo-rendered stereo frames. Validates that GazeboFullVIOBackend processes frames through feature extraction, stereo matching, and IMU pre-integration (code path coverage). Pose still comes from Gazebo ground truth. Tier 2 — requires Gazebo SITL.

obstacle_avoidance._comment_706: Issue #706 — Gazebo scenario, run with legacy main-branch avoider behaviour (no scenario-33 safety nets) for empirical comparison.

path_a._comment_706: Issue #706 — explicitly disable PR #647 voxel-snapshot append. PATH A inactive in this scenario, so mainly documentation.
